key_facts: Launched 2005 by Beijing Zhixin Media as China's highest-traffic PV portal
Highest-traffic solar industry portal in China since 2007
Daily average 40M+ page views at peak
Services: industry news + price quotation + supplier directory + consulting
B2B marketplace connecting solar installers with component manufacturers and distributors
No disclosed funding rounds — media/portal model funded by advertising and lead-gen
Significant traffic and deep indexing of Chinese solar supply chain
business_model_notes: Industry media + B2B marketplace hybrid. Revenue: advertising from solar manufacturers, lead generation fees from installer-supplier matching, premium directory listings, consulting reports. Not a transactional marketplace (no orders or payments processed); rather an information/discovery layer. Primary value: price discovery (daily module prices) and supplier vetting for the fragmented Chinese solar installer market.
competitive_position: Media/directory incumbent in China solar B2B information space. Competes with ENF Solar (ENFSolar.com / ENF.com.cn) which is more globally oriented. Solarbeglobal.com was an attempt to capture international traffic but ENF likely has stronger global position. Domestic traffic leadership is Solarbe's core moat.
research_notes: Medium confidence. 40M daily PV figure from Solarbe's own Crunchbase listing — self-reported. No independent traffic verification found. Founded 2005, predates most companies in this study. Included for its B2B marketplace role in the solar ecosystem, though it doesn't directly serve end-consumers.
